## Testing

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits: `<type>(<scope>)?: <description>`
- [ ] This PR contains one logically complete change
- [ ] Branch is rebased on the latest `main`
- [ ] If this is a new feature, an approved issue is linked
- [ ] If this PR includes OS-sensitive changes, behavior is verified on Linux/macOS/Windows (see `CONTRIBUTING.md`), or limitations are described
